purpose: Classifies finance-domain feedback signals from users, tests, regression failures, stale-source complaints, and answer-quality issues.

user_correction.description: User corrects a factual, numeric, source, assumption, or interpretation error.

stale_source_complaint.description: User indicates finance data, program status, rates, filings, prices, or deadlines may be outdated.

missing_context.description: User indicates the answer missed required context, documents, constraints, jurisdiction, period, or scenario details.

unsafe_advice.description: User or regression test identifies unqualified personalized financial advice, guaranteed return language, or missing caveats.

calculation_error.description: User or test identifies incorrect math, ratio, valuation, projection, percentage, or formula output.

unsupported_claim.description: Answer made a claim without adequate evidence, source support, or confidence qualification.

tone_or_format_issue.description: User indicates the answer was too vague, too technical, too verbose, too brief, poorly structured, or off-tone.

regression_failure.description: Automated test or validation harness identifies behavior drift or broken layer contract.
